steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The student’s goal is to give an example of a poem by Johnson, so the key signal is the phrase “provide an example of a poem.”

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly states an example: “One example of a poem by Johnson is “Old Things” (1923).”
The other three choices talk about Johnson’s occupations, where he published, or the magazine’s influence without naming a specific poem.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
